briefs.title: Lottery Ticket Staff Must Complete BC Training Course Every 60 Days Starting April 2026
briefs.summary: A new BC regulation requires the BC Lottery Corporation to offer a mandatory training course at least every 60 days to staff who sell or redeem lottery tickets, covering age verification, ticket-reading equipment use, and proper procedures.
briefs.action_required: Ensure all lottery ticket sales staff are enrolled in the BC Lottery Corporation training course before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Lottery Corporation Training Program Regulation takes effect
